projectDescription: A2A Protocol client and developer toolkit with CLI, TUI, and MCP server
keyFeatures: Comprehensive CLI for A2A protocol operations
MCP server for AI assistant integration
Local A2A server agent with LiteLLM support
publicApiSurface: handler tui - Launch interactive terminal interface
handler message send - Send messages to A2A agents
handler message stream - Stream messages from agents
handler task get - Get task status
handler task cancel - Cancel running tasks
handler task resubscribe - Resubscribe to task events
handler task notification set - Configure push notifications
handler card get - Fetch agent cards
handler card validate - Validate agent cards
handler server agent - Run local A2A agent
handler server push - Run push notification webhook server
handler session list - List saved sessions
handler session show - Show session details
handler auth bearer - Set bearer token authentication
handler auth api-key - Set API key authentication
